businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest internet platform — Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (fintech), Garena (gaming) trifecta
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Southeast Asian/Latin American consumer internet company operating Shopee (e-commerce), SeaMoney (digital finance), and Garena (gaming). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4% YoY), net income $1.58B (+255%). Friday close $86.00 (+0.99%). YTD -32% selloff. RSI 31 near oversold. Barclays slashed target from $226 to $120. Yet 10 of 11 analysts maintain Buy.
howTheyMakeMoney: Garena — Free Fire in-game purchases, licensing
keyProducts: Shopee — Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce platform
Free Fire — Globally popular battle royale game
Shopee AI Live Commerce — AI-powered shopping experience

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for growth stock. Cheaper than e-commerce peers

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS improvement expected. Attractive relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin compression from e-commerce investment but profitable

growthDrivers.title: Simply Wall St: Fundamentals Solid Despite YTD -32% Decline
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/13): Post-selloff valuation check. Revenue +36%, FCF $4.5B, Forward P/E 22x — price failing to reflect fundamentals.

growthDrivers.title: Seeking Alpha: Buy $136 Target — +58% Upside
growthDrivers.description: Seeking Alpha (3/10): Near-term margin compression is long-term moat investment. Buy at $86, target $136 for +58% upside.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee AI Live Commerce Test — New GMV Driver
growthDrivers.description: Simply Wall St (3/7): Shopee testing AI live commerce with NBA All-Star Metta World Peace. AI-powered shopping to improve conversion rates.

growthDrivers.title: Southeast Asia Digital Economy Growth — Structural Tailwind
growthDrivers.description: 700M population with rising digital penetration. E-commerce + fintech + gaming triangle ecosystem as structural growth driver.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee) + fintech (SeaMoney) + gaming (Garena) triangle ecosystem. 'Amazon of the East' positioning.

moats.description: Shopee leads Southeast Asian GMV. Self-built logistics network.
700M Southeast Asian population, Latin America expansion. Young digital-native market.

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce offensive. Rapidly penetrating Southeast Asia

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin America e-commerce leader. Direct competitor to Shopee

recentNews.significance: Widening gap between fundamentals and stock price. Approaching oversold territory

recentNews.significance: Major IB massive downgrade. However, even lowest target $120 is +40% above current price

recentNews.significance: Near-term margin compression is long-term moat investment. Buying opportunity

recentNews.significance: FY2025 results excellent. E-commerce margin compression guidance triggered selloff

recentNews.significance: AI-powered shopping innovation. Conversion rate improvement expected

analystOpinions.notableComment: 11 analysts Strong Buy consensus. MarketBeat $178.45, StockAnalysis $179.54, Fintel $194.72. Even Barclays' lowered $120 is +40% above current. Zero sell ratings. +107% upside.

risks.title: E-Commerce Margin Compression — 2026 Flat EBITDA Guidance
risks.description: Shopee logistics/subsidy investment expansion compressing e-commerce margins. 2026 EBITDA growth capped by guidance.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition — SEA Social Commerce Offensive
risks.description: TikTok Shop rapidly penetrating Southeast Asian e-commerce. Price/subsidy war intensifying.

risks.title: Barclays Target Cut $226→$120 — Institutional Sentiment Deterioration
risks.description: Major IB 47% target cut. Could weigh on institutional investor sentiment and trigger further selling.

risks.title: Garena Gaming Revenue Slowdown
risks.description: Free Fire growth plateauing. Gaming segment revenue declining. Needs new hit title.

risks.title: Stock Price Trend Deterioration — 52W -33.65%, -42% Below 200-Day SMA
risks.description: Trading significantly below 200-day SMA ($148.41). Strong technical downtrend.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 22x — Extreme Undervaluation Relative to Growth
buyReasons.rationale: +36% growth company at Forward P/E 22x. PEG 1.28 discounted vs peers. Half of MercadoLibre's P/E 60+.

buyReasons.title: Analyst Target $178 — +107% Above Current Price
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 analysts Buy. Even Barclays' lowered $120 is +40% above current. Extreme disconnect between Wall Street and stock price.

buyReasons.title: RSI 31 — Entering Oversold Territory
buyReasons.rationale: RSI near 30 is historical bounce signal. Technical rebound expected after YTD -32% decline.

buyReasons.title: FCF $4.51B + Cash $10.57B — Financial Stability
buyReasons.rationale: Net cash $7.24B ($12.29/share). Cash position alone is 14% of current market cap.

overallOpinion: Sea Limited posted strong FY2025 results — revenue $22.94B (+36%), net income +255% — yet has plunged YTD -32%. Barclays' target cut from $226 to $120 added further pressure.
Forward P/E 22x, analyst average $178 (+107%), RSI 31 oversold — fundamentals vs price at extreme disconnect. Even Barclays' floor $120 is +40% above current.

TikTok Shop competition and Garena slowdown are real risks, but Southeast Asia's structural digital economy growth and the triangle ecosystem moat make current pricing look like excessive panic. Strong Buy.

investmentVerdict.summary: Extreme undervaluation vs fundamentals. Even lowest target is +40%. Contrarian buy opportunity in oversold territory.

threads.text:
